functions.name: deploy-ai-code-review-pipeline
functions.description: Deploy AI Code Review Pipeline — configure GitHub Actions for automated PR review, static analysis, LLM-powered code comments, OWASP scanning, merge gates. Use when: deploy, configure CI/CD review.
